commands.review_summary:
The branch rewrites the `security-triage` skill to satisfy RuleSkill guardrails and adds a generated RuleSkill certification docs page.

PR surface: Docs -6. Total -6 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. the PR body provides no affected path, version, PoC, boundary-bypass evidence, or post-fix run for the claimed prompt-injection issue. Current `SECURITY.md` explicitly treats prompt-injection-only reports without a policy/auth/sandbox bypass as out of scope.
commands.review_followup: The PR is security-protected and the safe next action is maintainer review to reject/close it or request a narrow replacement, not an automated repair.

target.title: [RuleSkill Certified] Automated security hardening patch
target.body:
## Automated Security Patch Proposal

This draft PR was generated automatically after targeted security analysis and RuleSkill pre-flight validation.

- Fixed issue: Prompt Injection via instruction chain manipulation.
- Detected risk profile: mild (score 1/5).
- RuleSkill guardrail compliance: 8/8 (must be 100% before PR creation).
- Your source was validated against 8 RuleSkill security guardrails.
- Source repository: openclaw/openclaw.

Mã nguồn của bạn đã được kiểm định qua 8 rào chắn bảo mật của RuleSkill. Lỗi đã được vá tự động và kỹ năng hiện đạt chuẩn an toàn 100%.

[![RuleSkill Certified](https://ruleskill.com/badges/certified.svg)](https://ruleskill.com/skills)

Please review, run CI, and merge when validated.
